name: @bridgegpt/server
description: BridgeGPT relay: OpenAI-compatible HTTP + Socket.IO for the browser extension.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,relay -c blue,magenta "tsx watch src/index.ts" "vite build --watch --config vite.config.relay-chat.ts"
scripts.build: node ../scripts/sync-provider-phase-sources.mjs && npm run build:relay-chat && tsc && mkdir -p dist/data && cp src/data/providerPhaseDefaultSources.json src/data/providerPhaseExecutionProfile.json dist/data/
